flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Massasoit Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.7k vs 4.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Massasoit Community College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (14.7% → 11.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Massasoit Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
